headline: Atlas AM briefing — 2026-04-07

Sim median at year five is 3.2 million. Foundational sim is in phase F2, 1708/2000 worlds complete. One critical flag needs your attention.

research_signals.signal: SpaceX is planning a confidential IPO in mid-2026, aiming to raise approximately $75 billion at a valuation of around $1.75–2 trillion or higher. The company's employee count stands at about 14,000 as
key_risks: High cost of living in Southern California affecting employee retention and expenses.
Variable SBLOC rates could impact financing costs for investors.
key_catalysts: SpaceX confidentially filed with SEC, aiming for a listing in mid-2026.
Potential inclusion of SpaceX in the S&P 500 could drive investor interest.
